text: I feel curious and observant in these spaces. In the first scene, I sense the energy of preparation and collaboration—the tools, equipment, and people at work pique my interest about their shared purpose. In the second scene, surrounded by bold graphics and displays about research and development, I feel inspired and reflective, considering the ever-evolving nature of human progress and how our inventions shape who we are. Both spaces speak to the pursuit of knowledge and the creativity involved in both making and thinking.
